scenes.setting: Third-floor landing and kidnappers' room of the building
scenes.text_anchor: Leonard's singing sounded like a lullaby as it lightly resounded

scenes.setting: Kidnappers' room with the rescued hostage
scenes.text_anchor: With a gun and cane in each hand, Klein entered
Klein held back his laughter and walked out into the streets.

scenes.setting: Two-wheeled carriage leaving the scene, Tingen
scenes.text_anchor: Almost five minutes later, a few carriages rushed

scenes.setting: Klein's rented bedroom on Daffodil/Minsk Street, Tingen
scenes.text_anchor: After returning to Zouteland Street, Klein did not wait
